module top_module(
    input [3:0] binary_input,
    output reg [3:0] twos_complement_output
);always @(*) begin
        if (binary_input[3] == 1) begin
            twos_complement_output = ~binary_input + 1;
        end else begin
            twos_complement_output = binary_input;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      twos_complement_output <= binary_input; if (binary_input[3] == 0) begin twos_complement_output <= ~binary_input + 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule
